M1 webMI pro
############

.. rubric:: Configuration of the alarm list

*M1 webMI pro* alarms use a reduced number of parameters. Configure the :ref:`global parameters <global_parameters_alarmlist>` under :treeselection:`Global Parameters --> atvObjectDisplays --> Alarmlist --> Columns --> Alarm / Alarmlog` to show only the attributes that are provided by *webMI pro*. It is not necessary to configure any other list (like All, Disabled, Shelved or Suppressed), since they are not used by *webMI pro*. The following fields are supported and can be displayed by setting the *visibleMain* column to *true*:

- priority
- timestamp
- display
- displayedAddress
- eventtext
- ackn_state
- value
- ackn_conf

Every other attribute can be hidden (*visibleMain = false*) or deleted if necessary. To remove an entry completely, delete the *key* in the respective row and confirm with :guilabel:`OK`.
